results.name: minitap
results.title: minitap | Your fully managed AI QA engineer for mobile
results.text: Product Resources Sign in Get access 🇬🇧 THE AI QA ENGINEER FOR MOBILE Mobile QA coverage you don't have to hire for. For mobile teams shipping AI-written code without a QA bench. mini tests every critical flow like a real user, including your AI features, and surfaces the bugs your scripts miss, with repro and a fix prompt. Book a demo AS SEEN ON app.minitap.ai Coverage that pays for itself. Stop paying for a QA bench you can't hire. mini owns your release suite for a fraction of manual QA, and hands the hours back to your engineers. 5h of engineer time saved, per release 100% on AndroidWorld. Finds more bugs than any E2E test or agentic solution ~30 min to your first release-ready run Estimate your savings → HOW IT WORKS mini gets your app ready for release. REQUEST TEST RELEASE FEATURES mini owns your mobile test suite from end to end Ship the fix. mini owns the rest. EMULATED USER TESTING mini tests whether users can achieve their goals on your product. mini runs highest-fidelity mobile tests, as close to your users' experience as possible, including the AI features scripts can't reach. Tests survive any refactor. 0 authoring. 0 maintenance. E2E TEST SCRIPT YAML / SCRIPT ONE CHECKOUT = 21 BRITTLE INSTRUCTIONS 1 appId: com.acme.wallet 2 flows: 3 - launchApp 4 - tapOn: "Sign in" 5 - inputText: 6 id: "email-field" 7 text: "jane@acme.com" 8 - inputText: 9 id: "password-field" 10 text: "correct-horse" 11 - tapOn: "Continue" 12 - assertVisible: "Dashboard" 13 - tapOn: "Pay" 14 - inputText: 15 id: "amount" 16 text: "10.00" 17 - tapOn: "Confirm" 18 - assertVisible: "Payment successful" 19 - waitForAnimationToEnd 20 - tapOn: "Send" 21 - assertVisible: "Sent" SEE MORE MINI TEST CRITERION: A user can sign in and complete a $10 payment. SOURCE your code your PRD a one-liner SE

results.name: epiminds
results.title: Epiminds — Agentic AI for Marketing
results.text: Privacy Terms Careers Request Access MULTI AGENTIC TEAMS FOR MARKETING. Introducing Request Access A CONNECTED NETWORK OF AI AGENTS The operating system for marketing. Lucy orchestrates 20+ autonomous agents across data, creative, and strategy, forming a synchronized system that learns, adapts, and executes like your best marketing team, only faster. Lucy in the media Analyze Lucy dives into your data, uncovers insights, and explains performance in real time Execute Lucy can take action across every platform — adjusting budgets, optimizing ads, and launching updates. Hi Lucy! Every Monday at 9am, generate a weekly reports for all my clients and send me an email with a summary of the most important areas to look at. Absolutely! I will handle the weekly reporting going forward. Task Created Also make sure to filter out all irrelevant searches by updating our negative keyword structure for clients running Google Ads. On it! Adding that to my agenda each day. Task Updated Lucy adapts to you. Connected to Your Marketing Stack. Lucy integrates with your entire marketing ecosystem — channels, CRMs, eCommerce, analytics, data warehouses, and trend platforms — to deliver one holistic view of performance. Lucy Learns How You Work. Upload playbooks, training docs, and client context — Lucy adapts to your agency’s methods and preferences. Over time, she mirrors how your team thinks and operates, delivering results that feel truly yours. Native in Your Systems. Lucy is built to act like a colleague, she works where you work. You can chat with her in Slack or email her with questions or tasks. Lucy is Proactive. She constantly reviews performance, flags issues, and surfaces insights before they impact results. ”We’ve integrated Epiminds, a powerful stack of AI agents, into our advert

results.name: vertex3d
results.title: Vertex3D — Immersive WebGL Experience Studio
results.text: HARDWARE ACCELERATION REQUIRED [ HOME ][ PROJECTS ][ CONTACT ] THE IMMERSIVE EXPERIENCESTUDIO Strategic UX with Real-Time 3D and WebGL. Featured on FWA & Awwwards. SCROLL TO DISCOVER GLOBAL VALIDATION TRUSTED BY INDUSTRY LEADERS From Fortune 500 energy giants like Schlumberger (SLB) to ambitious startups, Vertex3D helps organizations transform complex ideas into immersive digital experiences. Our work goes beyond aesthetics, backed by a US Patent in UX Innovation (No. EP3501007A4) — ensuring every interface we design is engineered for clarity, usability, and measurable performance. THE Z-AXIS THE WEB IS FLAT WE FIX THAT Brands are losing attention because everyone looks the same. At Vertex3D, we believe the next generation of the web is immersive. From real-time 3D configurators for luxury products to complex data visualization for the energy sector, we use motion and depth to create meaningful digital experiences. We don’t just show your product. We let users experience it. DIGITAL TWIN ‍EXPERIENCE [ INSPECT CASE ] DIGITAL REAL ESTATE [ INSPECT CASE ] COMPLEX SAAS UX/UI [ INSPECT CASE ] HQ / HONG KONG Unit 706, 7/F, South Seas Centre Tower 2, No.75 Mody Road, Tsim Sha Tsui East, HongKong DIRECTOR Yann Trévelot LEGAL © 2026 Vertex3D Patent No. EP3501007A4 Global validation The Z-axis 01 // Digital Twin 02 // Digital Real Estate 03 // Complex Saas UX Initiate

results.name: ponder
results.title: Ponder
results.text: Menu Early Access Video Editing, Reinvented Your Fastest Cut, Powered by AI Sign Up Testimonials Night_Taxi_Ride.mp4 GoldenHour_Clip.mov Subway_Motion.mov Concert_Night.mp4 What Ponder can do Powerful tools designed for real editors. All driven by a single prompt. 01 Raw footage to rough cut Ponder picks the strongest takes, assembles A-roll, layers in B-roll, holds the pacing, and shapes your footage into a watchable first cut in minutes, not hours. 02 Deep understanding of your footage Ponder reads camera motion and composition, subject focus and scene type, pacing and emotional tone, audio clarity and continuity in every clip. It transforms messy footage into structured, searchable metadata you can actually edit with. 03 Edit with natural language Tell Ponder what you want. Tighten pacing, reorder scenes, punch up energy, shorten pauses, swap B-roll, emphasize emotion, or smooth transitions, and the timeline updates while every cut stays yours. Trusted by editors who cares about speed and craft "My footage is always real humans with real pauses and quirks. The editing is really finding those human moments, which sometimes don't come in the dialogue. To be able to train a tool to find those is incredible." Jamie Producer / Editor "36 to 48 hours worth of work that I was able to get done in about half a day!" Simo Motsa Producer, Editor "It takes your raw footage and assembles a rough cut so editors can jump in and get to the next stage — taking out a lot of the manual time and putting us in a position to get content to agency even quicker." Cody D'Ambrosio Head of Studio, SERHANT. "This is just crazy just to even have, because even if this is a clip that I'm not gonna use, it'll just inspire other ideas just to have the amount of detail. And it's insane that it has a
